summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building scalable distributed systems and shipping ML-powered products. Combines deep backend expertise with a product mindset; proven track record of leading cross-functional teams from 0 to 1.

bullets: Led the redesign of the core inference service, reducing p99 latency from 850ms to 180ms and saving $42K/month in compute.
Architected a multi-tenant feature-flag platform now used by 8 product teams; cut release rollback time by 75%.
Mentored 4 junior engineers; 2 promoted within a year.
Built the recommendation pipeline (Python, Kafka, Redis) serving 12M users daily with 99.95% uptime.
Designed an A/B-testing framework adopted across 5 squads, accelerating experiment velocity by 3x.
Drove migration from monolith to microservices on Kubernetes, reducing deploy time from 40 min to 6 min.
Developed REST and GraphQL APIs powering the customer dashboard (1.2M MAU).
Optimized PostgreSQL query plans, cutting average response time by 38%.
Implemented OAuth2 + RBAC, passing the company's first SOC 2 Type II audit.

education.details: Dean's List 6 semesters; teaching assistant for Data Structures.

projects.name: Resume Radar
projects.description: Open-source CLI that scores a resume against a job description using TF-IDF and skill embeddings.
bullets: 1.2K GitHub stars; ranked #3 on Hacker News show-and-tell.

projects.name: OrcaQueue
projects.description: Lightweight Redis-backed task queue with exactly-once delivery semantics.
bullets: Adopted by 3 production systems handling 200M+ jobs/month.
